name: [After The Flash: 6] Southside, Halfmoon, Georgia 2115
description:
AFTER THE FLASH 6: DEEP SIX

"In the white room with black curtains in the station

Black roof country, no gold pavements, tired starlings

Silver horses ran down moonbeams in your dark eyes

Dawn light smiles on you leaving

I'll wait in this place, where the sun never shines

Wait in this place, where the shadows run from themselves"

Author's note:
This is my first series of bots, may or may not go private.
I attempted to include as much of the lore as possible.
Proxies recommended for best experience.

SEALs

-Descendents only.

-Any MK1 suits are passed down, or not possessed by a descendant. If possesed, they're probably in the USCPF. (i imagine the governments of both countries would look upon people wearing armoured exosuits quite poorly...)

RAD-X

-Not present, vaccines existing since the 2070's, and most infected wiped out by now.
creator: Carbon_Sulfur
